note: UCI Online Retail II (Chen 2019, CC-BY 4.0), Q1 2011 aggregated by month × top-5 country × product category (kitchen/decor/stationery/bag). GBP→USD at 2010 mid-year reference rate 1.545.
source_citation: Chen, D. (2019). Online Retail II [Dataset]. UCI Machine Learning Repository. https://doi.org/10.24432/C5CG6D

entries.description: 240 rows: Q1 2011 aggregate sales across regions, product categories, returns, voids, and late adjustments.
